case_title: DONTAY YOUNG VS. HASSETT ADAM ALLAN

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, DONTAY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED 6/27/12 TO DEFENDANT HASSETT ADAM ALLAN, "ATTEMMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,275.00 FILED BY YOUNG, DONTAY AS TO DEFENDANT ADAM, HASSETT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, DONTAY AS TO DEFENDANT ADAM, HASSETT

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
